status: DEV/SYNTHETIC-ONLY — NOT a clinically authoritative red-flag question bank. Illustrative records for development and Trunk 9.0 tests only. Escalation tiers are illustrative. Clinical + regulatory sign-off required before any patient-facing use.

red_flag_questions.question: Any loss of bladder or bowel control, or numbness around the back passage/genitals?
Any new weakness in the legs that is getting worse?
Any fever, or recent serious infection or IV drug use?
Any unexplained weight loss or history of cancer?
Did the headache come on suddenly and reach its worst within seconds to minutes?
Any fever with neck stiffness or a rash that doesn't fade under pressure?
Any new weakness, vision loss, confusion or difficulty speaking?
Over 50 with new headache, scalp tenderness or jaw pain when chewing?
